content:
✅ Why This Works:
• Mirrors real RPG mechanics—many factors influence outcomes.
• Encourages strategic play—students must prepare for varied circumstances.
• Enhances unpredictability—no two weeks will feel the same.

📌 Final Lock-In Questions for Version 6.5

1. Should the Scribe have the ability to “rewrite” a single event for strategic purposes?

✔ If yes, how often?

2. Should XP also be used to counteract negative debuffs or reroll unwanted assignments?

✔ If yes, how much should it cost?

3. Should day/night settings apply differently to different archetypes?

✔ Example: The Trickster gains a persuasion buff at night but a perception debuff during the day.

🚀 Version 6.5 now finalizes the RPG inventory system, Scribe mechanics, layered skill checks, and day/night phase integration.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 317 (chunk 317/555)
